title: Verify deterministic statement preview
preconditions: Qualified source fixtures, active and archived account doubles, and mutation counters are available.
steps: Preview unchanged and changed sources against valid, missing, archived, conflicting, and ambiguous accounts, then repeat identical previews.
expected: Every acceptance criterion of FR-INGEST-STATEMENT-PREVIEW holds; identical preview is deterministic, source hashes remain unchanged, and LEDGER mutation count stays zero.
